reference_state.comment: Norm-based V_bulk reference: pore-free rock at 600 MPa, 400 °C (NOT Fig.2 at 100 MPa, 100 °C)

equation_1.description: V_bulk(P_bar, F_bar) in km/s. Dual quadratic branches blended by product tanh windows W_L, W_H (KKHS02 §2.2).

inputs.P_bar_GPa: volume- or melt-weighted mean melting pressure (§4 eq. 9)
inputs.F_bar: mean melt fraction over the melting interval (§4 eq. 8)

print_errata.issue: KKHS02 §2.2 printed table lists b1 = +0.55; that sign is inconsistent with Fig.3 V(P,F) contours.
print_errata.evidence: Digitized Fig.3 contours (data/ScreenShot_2026-07-09_105537_962.txt): flipping only b1 to -0.55 drops rms from ~0.16 to ~0.002 km/s (validation/check_eq1_print_refit.py; figures/eq1_paper_vs_b1neg.png).
print_errata.note: Forward models use equation_1.coefficients (corrected). Keep printed_coefficients_for_comparison only for errata plots / audits.

window_functions.comment: W_L dominates at low P, low F; W_H at high P, high F; smooth transition between branches

applicable_range.source_rock: dry pyrolite peridotite melt (MORB primary basalts)
applicable_range.comment: Extrapolation outside this box is not validated by KKHS02 regression

fig11_vbulk_linear.description: Holbrook (2000) Ch3 eq.(3.1) linear V(P,F) — catalog cross-check only; NOT the KKHS02 Fig.11 d/h predictor (paper uses eq.(1) with section-4 P_bar, F_bar).
fig11_vbulk_linear.source: Holbrook (2000) thesis Ch3 eq.(3.1); KKHS02 Fig.11 standard-model paths

regression_data_policy.weighting: equal per-point weighted misfit for experimental vs supplementary

source: Korenaga et al. (2002) JGR 10.1029/2001JB001030 §2.2; b1 sign corrected vs printed table (see equation_1.print_errata)
